# Connected Warfare | Anduril

Anduril's Connected Warfare domain builds AI-driven systems—EagleEye, Menace-I, Menace-X, Menace-T, Voyager, and Lattice Mesh—that connect sensors, shooters, and decision-makers, enabling U.S. and allied forces to win at the edge in fast-moving, contested environments where decisions must be made in seconds.
